mapper.select:
select id, product_name, product_pics from cm_product where id in
#{id}

select merchant_id from cm_product where id in
#{id}

select cp.id as procuctId, cp.product_name as productName, cmi.merchant_name as merchantName from cm_product cp left join cm_merchant_info cmi on cp.merchant_id = cmi.id where cp.shelve_state = '1' and shelve_area = '1'
mapper.update: update cm_product set shelve_state = '0' where shelve_state = '1' and merchant_id = #{merchantId}
